name: Angkor Wat
majorAchievements: Largest religious monument in the world
description: Angkor Wat is the largest religious monument in the world, originally built as a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu and gradually transformed into a Buddhist site. Its five lotus-shaped towers, extensive bas-reliefs depicting scenes from Hindu mythology, and massive moat represent the pinnacle of Khmer architecture. The temple complex covers over 160 hectares.
